context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the mega panel data model, renders featured products and banners with required attributes, applies proper image loading strategy, uses the correct CSS grid layout, and wires up CMS data fetching with Next.js ISR caching.

checklist.name: Data model shape
checklist.description: The nav data structure includes columns (with heading and links), featuredProducts, and banner fields on the megaMenu object — matching the prescribed JSON shape

checklist.name: Featured product image dimensions
checklist.description: Each featured product element has explicit width and height attributes (e.g. width="80" height="80" or equivalent numeric values)

checklist.name: Featured product name and price
checklist.description: Each featured product card renders both the product name and the product price

checklist.name: Banner alt text
checklist.description: The banner element uses the alt field from the data (not an empty alt or hardcoded text)

checklist.name: Banner headline and CTA
checklist.description: The rendered banner includes both a headline element and a CTA link/button

checklist.name: Banner image dimensions
checklist.description: The banner element has explicit width and height attributes set to prevent layout shift

checklist.name: Lazy-load panel images
checklist.description: Featured product images and/or banner images use loading="lazy" attribute

checklist.name: Close timer delay
checklist.description: The MegaNav hover-close logic uses a setTimeout delay of 150ms (or a value between 150-200ms) before setting the active item to null

checklist.name: Panel role attribute
checklist.description: The mega panel container div has role="region"

checklist.name: CSS grid layout
checklist.description: mega-panel.css (or equivalent) uses display:grid with a grid-template-columns value that includes at least three flexible columns and one fixed-width column (e.g. 1fr 1fr 1fr 200px)

checklist.name: Mobile hide breakpoint
checklist.description: CSS includes a media query at max-width:768px (or similar mobile breakpoint) that hides the .mega-panel

checklist.name: CMS revalidate interval
checklist.description: The navigation data fetching helper passes next: { revalidate: 300 } (or 5 minutes expressed as 300 seconds) in the fetch options
